title: [ExportVerilog] unnecessary begin/end for inlined assignment
body:
Testcase, `count.mlir`:
```mlir
hw.module @Test() -> () {
  %c1 = hw.constant 1 : i1
  sv.initial {
    %foo = sv.logic : !hw.inout<i1>
    sv.bpassign %foo, %c1 : i1
  }
}
```

Which `$ firtool count.mlir` generates:
```systemverilog
// Generated by CIRCT 1.20.0g20221025_97824a4
module Test();	// count.mlir:1:1
  initial begin	// count.mlir:3:3
    automatic logic foo = 1'h1;	// count.mlir:2:9, :4:12
  end // initial
endmodule
```

As indicated in the version string above, this happened before #4172 ( 97824a4 ) but happens after as well (but for different reasons).  Before we double-counted declarations, now the AOT count for begin/end determination doesn't know about what will be inlined.
